case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. YNDOLFO MARINEL DAVILA SUNUX

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVILA SUNUX, YNDOLFO MARINEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVILA SUNUX, YNDOLFO MARINEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DAVILA SUNUX, YNDOLFO MARINEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2019 - JUDGMENT.

DEFENDANT YNDOLFO MARINEL DAVILA SUNUX DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
